suites.title: RBAC & data-leak expectations  (a FAILURE = a vulnerability)

specs.title: student cannot read an arbitrary class journal
parent cannot read an arbitrary class journal
student cannot read teacher load-transfer history (grades leak)
student cannot list all staff (email/role disclosure)
student cannot read the school-wide grading overview

suites.title: Scenario A — grade moderation (teacher → zavuch → analyst)

specs.title: moderation page renders for zavuch (not gated)
status machine: submitted →(zavuch)→ moderated →(analyst)→ published
teacher is forbidden from the moderation API
workload page renders for zavuch (not gated)
transfer reassigns load and exposes read-only history

suites.title: Scenario C — teacher descriptors L1/L2/L3 visibility

specs.title: khaydarova located via /api/v1/teachers
zavuch sees the L2 descriptor (and nothing above L2)
teacher does NOT see her own L2/L3 descriptors (key demo fact)
